prompts: Cinematic wide shot in a warm wood Japanese fantasy RPG guild library. Ari Dawncrest, a mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags, and Ari Silverbrook, a guild coordinator in a formal cloak, stand facing each other. Both raise their hands in a synchronized, harmless spell practice. Soft, glowing mana ribbons begin to weave between their palms. Readable, cooperative body motion, warm ambient lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot in the warm wood Japanese fantasy RPG guild library. Ari Dawncrest and Ari Silverbrook maintain their synchronized spell practice. Ari Silverbrook gently adjusts her hand position, causing the glowing mana ribbons to stabilize and pulse softly between them. Calm, focused teamwork, consistent character appearance, lighting, and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
